subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-09-06 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Man must become accustomed unto all things, and taste of the cold and heat and joy and sorrow of the world, and turn not away from fullness nor from hunger [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان باید به همه چیز معتاد باشد و از سردی و گرمی و خوشی و حزن عالم بچشد و از سیری و گرسنگی رو برنگرداند
subcodes.subjects: @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @effort; striving, @knowledge of self
